location.name: Cabo Girão Skywalk
location.summary: A glass-floored platform above the south coast with views over cliffs, ocean and farmland.
location.imageAlt: Cabo Girao Skywalk above Madeira south coast

article.intro: Cabo Girão is a dramatic sea-cliff viewpoint west of Funchal, best known for its glass-floored skywalk.
article.history: The cape became an iconic viewpoint because of its high cliffs and the small cultivated plots far below.
highlights: Panoramas over the south coast and Atlantic
Views of terraced farmland at the foot of the cliffs
article.practicalTip: Go early or late in the day to avoid the busiest tour-bus period.
